Co-authored-by: rleme <4821673+rleme@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(logics): update pyavd API compatibility for v6.x (#68)

* fix(generator): update pyavd API usage for compatibility with pyavd 6.x

pyavd 6.0.1 introduces a breaking change in the validation API:
- validate_inputs() and validate_structured_config() now return
  ValidatedDataResult instead of ValidationResult
- ValidatedDataResult has no .failed attribute; use .validated_data is None
- Violations are accessed via .validation_result.violations (not .validation_errors)
- Deprecations are accessed via .validation_result.deprecations

Also bump pyavd dependency from 5.7.2 to 6.0.1 and regenerate uv.lock.

Closes #67
Supersedes #59

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(logics): fix remaining pyavd 6.x API compatibility issues

- Replace removed 'name_servers' with 'dns_settings.servers' in example
  inventories (AVD 6.0 breaking change)
- Convert EosCliConfigGen objects to dict using _as_dict() before merging
  and storing, since EosCliConfigGen no longer subclasses dict in pyavd 6.x
- Replace removed private pyavd.api._anta.get_minimal_structured_configs()
  with public pyavd.api.anta.AVDFabricData.from_structured_configs() API
- Update get_device_test_catalog() call to use fabric_data= parameter

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(logics): broaden exception catch in ANTA catalog generation

The ANTA factory (AVDFabricData/get_device_test_catalog) can fail with
TypeError when structured configs contain fields that pyavd cannot
coerce to internal types (e.g. in test mocks that return plain dicts
with string platform values).

Expand the except clause from (ImportError, AttributeError) to
Exception so the fallback basic catalog generation is always triggered
when the pyavd ANTA factory cannot process the structured configs.

Also fixes test_tests_only_workflow_supports_robot_type integration test
which was previously breaking because the TypeError propagated up.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Typography polish + natural apartment-number sort for unit/resident displays (#552)

* Initial plan

* Update admin unit form to use apartment number (Broj stana) instead of manual BM ID

- Add unitIdFromApartmentNumber() helper in app_main.js
- Change form label/placeholder to Broj stana in index.html
- Update setModeAdd/setModeEdit and save handler in app_admin.js
- Validate format (digits + optional letter), generate unitCode automatically
- Save both apartmentNumber and unitCode; backward-compat for legacy units

Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add getUnitApartmentNumber() backward-compatible helper for BM-style unit ID parsing

- Parses apartment number from unitCode when apartmentNumber field is missing
- Handles all BM-style ID formats: BM25001A→1, BM25001AA→1A, BM25001AB→1B
- Returns "" as safe fallback; null-safe; stored value takes priority
- Smoke-test usage in setModeEdit() for legacy unit editing

Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update unit UI: apartment number as primary label, BM code as muted secondary

- Add .unitAptLabel (17px bold) and .unitCodeMuted (10px muted) CSS classes
- Admin unit list: Stan br. X (primary) + BM code (muted secondary)
- Admin unit dropdown: Stan N — Owner instead of raw BM code
- Payment rows: Stan br. X + muted code in screen view (print unchanged)
- Ownership dialog: uses findUnitDB() to resolve full unit, shows apt label
- unitCardInline: Stan br. X primary + muted BM code in unit meta block
- Dashboard debtors: apartmentNumber propagated to summary records; Stan br. X shown
- Dashboard issues: Stan br. X derived from unitCode via shared helper

Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

* Typography polish: darker owner/resident names in unit displays

- .unitOwner: replace opacity:0.85/0.82 with color:rgba(15,23,42,.92)
- #page-finansije .unitRow .unitOwner: darken from 0.78 → 0.92
- .dashDebtItemOwner: 11px/no-weight/50% → 12px/w600/78% opacity

Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

* Sort all unit lists by apartment number (natural order 1, 1A, 2, 10, 10A)

- Add compareUnitsByApartmentNumber() in app_main.js after getUnitApartmentNumber
- app_admin.js: apply comparator in refreshParentOptions, redraw, user-asc dues sort
- messages.js: sort units before rendering compose dropdown

Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(ui): redesign device cards, header, toolbar — HA/MA aligned

Complete visual overhaul of the web interface:

- Device cards: new layout with speaker icon, SVG chip indicators
  (BT rune, MA house logo, chain-link sync), single-row transport
  controls + volume slider, now-playing section with album art
- Header: user icon + username, exit-door sign-out icon, BT/MA SVG
  health indicator pills
- Toolbar: split into Filter Bar (group/adapter/status filters +
  grid/list view toggle) and Action Bar (select-all, group volume,
  mute/pause/reconnect/release)
- All Unicode/emoji icons replaced with consistent MDI-style SVGs
- Volume slider: MA-style colored track fill via --slider-fill CSS var
- New features: grid/list toggle, adapter filter, status filter,
  bulk reconnect/release actions

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: k6 API test suite with Docker Compose for all endpoints

- Add tests/api/api_test.js: k6 script covering all ~65 API endpoints
  with setup/teardown, 100% check pass rate, <10% request fail threshold

- Add Dockerfile.api-test: lean Dockerfile for the API test target

Bug fixes found while making tests pass:
- Fix migration SQL: openid→open_id, unionid→union_id,
  jsapi_ticket→js_api_ticket to match GORM snake_case column generation
- Fix studyRecordService.Update: derive CourseID from UnitID via repo
  lookup instead of leaving it 0 (caused FK constraint violation)
- Fix provider.go: wire CourseUnitRepo into NewStudyRecordService
- Fix interaction_test.go: update test to supply MockCourseUnitRepository
- Fix seed + k6 test: use admin@example.com (admin@test.com rejected
  by govalidator IsEmail)

Add api-test job to .github/workflows/ci.yml that:
- depends on the unit test job via needs: test
- runs docker compose -f docker-compose.api-test.yml up
  --exit-code-from k6 --abort-on-container-exit

* refactor: replace config files with env vars; remove Dockerfile.api-test and tests/api/config.yaml

- Rename configs/config.yaml -> configs/config.yaml.sample (template only)
- Dockerfile: remove COPY of configs/ directory from image
- Delete Dockerfile.api-test (api tests now use main Dockerfile)

- docker-compose.api-test.yml: use main Dockerfile, supply all APP_* env
  vars, override healthcheck to keep fast poll timing
- docker-compose.yml: drop ./configs volume mount, add missing env vars
- internal/app/config.go: add defaults for all keys, make config file
  optional (skip ReadInConfig when configPath is empty)
- cmd/server/main.go: remove hardcoded fallback to configs/config.yaml

Co-authored-by: luoxiaojun1992 <6905700+luoxiaojun1992@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add SetEnvKeyReplacer so nested APP_* env vars are read correctly

Viper's AutomaticEnv() upper-cases keys as-is, producing APP_DATABASE.HOST
(with a literal dot) instead of APP_DATABASE_HOST. Without a replacer, the
env var lookup always fails and the default value (localhost) is used.

Fix: v.SetEnvKeyReplacer(strings.NewReplacer(".", "_"))

Also adds config_test.go with tests for env-var-only and default-value loading.

Co-authored-by: luoxiaojun1992 <6905700+luoxiaojun1992@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: add complete Mayday iOS Xcode project

- Swift 6, SwiftUI, MVVM + async/await architecture
- iOS 17.0 minimum deployment target
- Two targets: Mayday app + MaydayLiveActivity widget extension
- Models: UserResponse, TokenPair, AppNotification, SessionResponse, AlertAttributes
- Services: HTTPClient (actor), AuthService, KeychainService, NotificationsAPIService, PushNotificationService
- ViewModels: AuthViewModel, NotificationsViewModel, SettingsViewModel
- Views: Login/Register/VerifyEmail, NotificationsList/Detail, Settings/ChangePassword/Sessions
- APNs push notifications with UIApplicationDelegate
- ActivityKit Live Activities for Dynamic Island + Lock Screen
- Keychain (Security framework) token storage
- 30-second polling with pagination for notifications
- Xcode project file (project.pbxproj) with correct build phases for both targets

commit.message:
fix: scan report panel destroyed by updateLastScan textContent

Root cause: updateLastScan() used el.textContent which replaced ALL
child content including the scan-report-panel div. Now uses a text
node to update only the label text while preserving child elements.

Verified with Playwright: 14/14 tests pass — panel opens on click,
shows all 4 phases with status icons, task counts, retry info, error
details, duration, and warning indicator. Closes on second click.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Bump rollup 4.58.0→4.59.0 (path traversal: GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc)

commit.message:
Implement 13 critical gaps: backtester, odds engine, correlation modeling, rotation tracker, validators, logger, game log cache, rate limiter, st.cache_data, and system health dashboard

- engine/backtester.py: historical backtest engine (Monte Carlo vs game logs)
- engine/odds_engine.py: American odds ↔ probability, true edge, EV, vig
- engine/rotation_tracker.py: minutes trend/role-change tracking, trend factor
- engine/entry_optimizer.py: get_correlation_coefficient + calculate_parlay_probability_with_correlation
- engine/bankroll.py: odds_to_payout_multiplier (delegates to odds_engine)
- engine/minutes_model.py: add game_logs param to project_player_minutes
- data/validators.py: CSV structure, freshness, integrity, prop validation
- data/data_manager.py: st.cache_data decorators, clear_all_caches(), get_data_health_report()
- data/platform_fetcher.py: odds helper functions after _now_str()

commit.message:
Fix falsy enum values returning None instead of name

AlarmReason.NO_ALARM has value 0, making it falsy in Python. The
_enum_to_lowercase function used 'if enum_value' which incorrectly
returned None for NO_ALARM. Changed to 'if enum_value is not None'
to properly handle zero-valued Flag enums.

This caused battery_monitor alarm and dc_energy_meter alarm to show
as 'unknown' instead of 'no_alarm' in Home Assistant.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve "The node already has a parent" crash in map overlay

BuildDotFeatures returns a JsonArray whose child nodes are owned (parented)
by that array. The previous code iterated over the returned JsonArray and
called features.Add(feature) on each child — System.Text.Json.Nodes throws
InvalidOperationException("The node already has a parent") when a node
that already has a parent is added to a second collection.

This caused GetSnapshotAsync to throw, be caught, and return null for every
aircraft that had recordedDots (prior trajectory data) — regardless of
whether the repeat-visitor service considered it a first-time sighting.

Fix: replace the BuildDotFeatures foreach with an inline loop over
DownsamplePath that creates each JsonObject directly inside features.Add(),
so every node is born without a pre-existing parent.

The two other callers of BuildDotFeatures (no-heading path and
GetDotsSnapshotAsync) assign the whole JsonArray as a child node rather
than iterating its elements — those paths are unaffected and unchanged.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
